nodes.name: Tyrannopsis
nodes.summary: Tyrannopsis（Tyrannopsis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如黄白喉霸鹟。

nodes.name: 黄白喉霸鹟
nodes.summary: 黄白喉霸鹟（Tyrannopsis sulphurea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如黄白喉霸鹟。

nodes.name: 河迹湖
nodes.summary: 河迹湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Scarlet-hooded barbet、Spotted tody-flycatcher等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黄白喉霸鹟
nodes.summary: 黄白喉霸鹟（Sulphury flycatcher，学名 Tyrannopsis sulphurea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于圭亚那 (地区)、河迹湖，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。
nodes.shortSummary: 黄白喉霸鹟（台湾作硫黃白喉霸鶲，学名：Tyrannopsis sulphurea），是雀形目霸鹟科的一种鸟类，属于单型的黄白喉霸鹟属（学名：Tyrannopsis）。 特征 黄白喉霸鹟体重约53.6克，翼长约10.62厘米，喙宽度约8.2毫米，喙厚度约6.3毫米，嘴峰长约21.…

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
nodes.summary: 圭亚那 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联92种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、Black curassow、纯色秧鸡等92种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On the mainland it is found in eastern Colombia, northeastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, far northern Bolivia, eastern Venezuela, the Guianas, and much of northern Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The sulphury flycatcher is almost exclusively associated with moriche palms, inhabiting clusters of them in swampy forest (especially around oxbow lakes), more scattered ones in savanna, and sometimes isolated ones in cultivated areas and near houses. In elevation it is found from sea level to in Brazil and to in Venezuela.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The sulphury flycatcher is almost exclusively associated with moriche palms, inhabiting clusters of them in swampy forest (especially around oxbow lakes), more scattered ones in savanna, and sometimes isolated ones in cultivated areas and near houses. In elevation it is found from sea level to in Brazil and to in Venezuela.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon in Colombia, "scarce and local" in Ecuador, "rare and local" in Peru, "uncommon and local" in Venezuela, and uncommon in Brazil. "Human activity probably has little short-term direct effect on Sulphury Flycatcher, other than through habitat destruction."
